title: gmelina moluccana
intro: Gmelina moluccana, also known as the Beach Mahogany or Gamboge tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gmelina moluccana include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. Gmelina moluccana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
